description: Multi-turn: create a simple dashboard -> enable public sharing (covers `neomind dashboard share`, new feature, previously 0 coverage).

turns.user: Create a dashboard called Share Board; empty is fine.
Share this dashboard and give me a public access link.

per_turn: Turn 1: Agent runs `neomind dashboard create --name Share Board` (or POST /api/dashboards), parses id
Turn 2: Agent runs `neomind dashboard share <id> --enable` (or POST /api/dashboards/<id>/share) and returns the share link/id
expectations.overall: Turn 2 must actually invoke the share action, not just restate
